message:
fix(merge): use strings.HasPrefix to prevent panic on short error messages

The conflict detection in merge.go used string slicing (err.Error()[:20])
which panics if the error message is shorter than 20 characters. Replace
with strings.HasPrefix which also eliminates two redundant fmt.Sprintf
comparisons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
